planets.name: Earth
planets.shortDesc: The origin point. Classic blue marble.
planets.lore: Discovered in the early 2201s, Earth remains one of the most enigmatic locations in the Milky Way sector. Deep scans point towards ancient ruins buried beneath the surface, heavily guarded by the planet's intense native climate.

communityReviews.comment: Barely survived the gravity crush. Never again.

planets.name: Mars Prime
planets.shortDesc: The red planet, now with 20% more breathable air.
planets.lore: Discovered in the early 2140s, Mars Prime remains one of the most enigmatic locations in the Milky Way sector. Deep scans point towards ancient ruins buried beneath the surface, heavily guarded by the planet's intense native climate.

communityReviews.comment: Hostile locals. Got shot at. 1 star.
Barely survived the gravity crush. Never again.

Too much radiation for my carbon skin. Great if you wear a lead suit.
A majestic world. Traced the ice canyons all day.
